text.title: ba-governance Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ba-governance as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Escalation paths that use role titles without named individuals ("Director of Product" rather than a specific person).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Role titles become orphaned when people leave or org charts change; named individuals ensure the escalation path actually resolves in a crisis.

failure-mode.description: Communication plan that defaults all channels to Slack regardless of audience or message formality.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Slack is appropriate for async informal communication; regulatory-track approvals, formal sign-offs, and sponsor status reports require traceable channels with retention guarantees.

failure-mode.description: LLM generates a communication plan with a six-tier steering committee for a four-person project.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs over-template governance artifacts for any project they perceive as "enterprise" regardless of actual team size. Pass team size and compliance flag explicitly in the system prompt to constrain output appropriately.

failure-mode.description: LLM auto-closes CRs when CI is green without requiring human approval.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Green CI indicates technical quality; governance integrity requires a human approval trace. Automating CR closure on CI signals removes the accountable human from the audit trail.

failure-mode.description: Matrix-vs-reality drift: the published matrix says "Steering Committee approves scope changes," but in reality the PM emails the sponsor and ships.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Symptom: audit findings during regulatory review. Fix: monthly sample of CRs vs matrix.

failure-mode.description: Approval-tier inflation: every CR escalates to "XL / Steering" because impact assessment is skipped.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Symptom: steering meetings with 30+ items. Fix: enforce T-shirt size with a checklist + mandatory link to impact analysis.

failure-mode.description: Channel sprawl: comms plan starts with email + Jira; six weeks later there are five Slack channels, two Confluence spaces, and a shared Drive folder, none referenced in the plan.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Fix: agent runs a quarterly comms-audit task that diffs declared channels vs actual.

failure-mode.description: Unowned artifacts: governance.md exists, no one updates it.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Fix: a single Owner: line + cron-triggered subagent that opens a "stale doc" issue at day 30.
